steps.title: Use the supplementary rule
steps.content:
Supplementary angles have measures that add to $180^\circ$. For angles $x$ and $y$, that means:
$$x+y=180$$

steps.title: Isolate the second angle
steps.content:
Subtract $x$ from both sides:
$$y=180-x$$
This relationship must be true for any supplementary pair. The answer is A.
